achievements.title: Does Whatever a Spider Can!
achievements.description: Defeat all of the bad guys on "Get To The Bank"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Move It Spidey, Move It!
achievements.description: Complete "Bank Approach" in less than 60 seconds
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: The Bank Heist
achievements.description: Get a feel for being Spider-Man and then go and stop a bank robbery, save some hostages, and defuse some bombs. Typical Spidey stuff.
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Working Overtime
achievements.description: Race to the Bugle and stop Scorpion from attacking Jameson, then flee from the pursuing NYPD accusing you of committing the Science Tech Expo heist
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Where Do All These Guys Come From?
achievements.description: Successfully evade the cops, then stop Rhino from causing more destruction, then follow and try to stop Venom from doing the same
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Venomous Lizards
achievements.description: Follow Venom down and through the sewers into the subway, then navigate through the sewage plant and get to the Lizard's Lair to save Mary Jane
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Stuck Between a Brock and a Hard Place
achievements.description: Save Mary Jane from Venom, then work with him to find the Spider-Man Imposter and take down the symbiotes at the Daily Bugle
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: From the Fish Bowl to the Frying Pan
achievements.description: Defeat Mysterio, then head to the waterfront warehouse and go deep underwater to stop the fog from spreading through New York, then stop Doc Ock from enacting his plan
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Are Your Ears Ringing?
achievements.description: Defeat Carnage with the power of a Sonic Bubble and good ol' Spidey combat
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: For Hire: Camera Man
achievements.description: Escape from both the facility and the rampaging Monster Ock
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: You'll Never Guess Who He Wants to Be. Spider-Man!
achievements.description: Complete the game on Kid Mode difficulty
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Ultimate Spider-Man
achievements.description: Complete the game on Hard difficulty
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: The Power.....It Feels Good
achievements.description: Complete the game on Hard difficulty while wearing the Captain Universe costume
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Symbiotic Bond
achievements.description: Defeat Carnage while wearing the Symbiote Spider-Man costume
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Courtesy of Your Friendly Neighborhood......Man?
achievements.description: Rescue all the hostages in "Hostage Situation" on Hard difficulty while wearing the Peter Parker costume and with two web cartridges left
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Oh, What a Tangled Web We Weave
achievements.description: Collect the comic on "Race To The Bugle"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Air Spidey
achievements.description: Perform a long range flying kick in "Waterfront Warehouse"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: I Haven't Worn This Much Before....
achievements.description: Complete "Catch Venom" with the Spidey Armor equipped
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Spring Cleaning
achievements.description: Defeat 20 Symbiotes in "Bugle's Basement"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: A Different Time....
achievements.description: Visit the Goblin's Lair while wearing the Spider-Man 2099 costume
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Geronimo!!!!!!
achievements.description: Fall from the top of the elevator all the way down to the bottom in "Elevator Descent"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Power Management
achievements.description: Defeat Rhino on Hard difficulty without destroying any of the generators
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Peter Sent Me
achievements.description: Save Mary Jane from Venom while wearing the Spider-Man 2099 costume
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: There's an Electro Storm Coming.....
achievements.description: Discover the Lizard's whereabouts in "The Lizard's Maze"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: The Power of the Press Triumphs!
achievements.description: Become the front page of the Daily Bugle in "Stop The Presses!"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: You're More Angry Back Alley than Friendly Neighborhood
achievements.description: Complete "Spidey vs. Venom!" while wearing the Scarley Spidey costume and without using any webbing
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Web Swinger
achievements.description: Web swing for a total of 15 seconds cumulative on "Get To The Bank!", "Bank Approach", and "Race To The Bugle"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: This Is Something Else.....
achievements.description: Unlock the Symbiote Spider-Man costume
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: He Protec, He Attac, but Most Importantly.... He Collec
achievements.description: Collect all of the comics
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Quite the Wardrobe, Parker
achievements.description: Unlock all of the costumes
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Thrill of the Hunt
achievements.description: Complete "Item Hunt" in less than a minute
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: God Speed, Spider-Man
achievements.description: Complete "Speed Training 1" in less than 35 seconds
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: You're Not Superman You Know
achievements.description: Complete "Speed Training 2" in less than 1 minute and 20 seconds
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Strong Focus On What I Want
achievements.description: Complete "Speed Training 3" in less than 35 seconds
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: What Are You Doin' Up There?!
achievements.description: Achieve a score of 10,000 on "Zipline Training"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Hey!
achievements.description: Defeat 20 or more Henchmen in "60 Second Time Attack"
achievements.author: rj0217

achievements.title: Raining Carnage
achievements.description: Defeat 30 or more Symbiotes in "Survival Mode Building Top"
achievements.author: rj0217
